properties.description: Famous xiaolongbao (soup dumplings) since 1900, located next to Yu Garden
properties.notes: Ground floor is cheaper but longer queue. Upper floors have table service at higher prices.

properties.description: Shanghai's most famous shengjianbao (pan-fried pork dumplings) — crispy bottomed, soup-filled, and made fresh all day at this flagship Huanghe Road location
properties.notes: Order at the counter, pay first, then collect. 4 dumplings per order. Bite a small hole to let steam out before eating or you'll burn your mouth. Lines move fast.

properties.description: World-renowned Taiwanese xiaolongbao chain — consistently excellent soup dumplings, reliable for travelers who want a benchmark experience
properties.address: L3-315, IFC Mall, 8 Century Ave, Pudong
properties.notes: More expensive than local alternatives but zero-risk quality. Open kitchen lets you watch dumpling wrappers being folded. Convenient if already visiting Lujiazui.

properties.description: Beloved local hole-in-the-wall known for its exceptionally thin-skinned, intensely flavored xiaolongbao — a local favorite over the tourist-heavy Nanxiang
properties.notes: Opens early and often sells out by noon. Cash only. No English menu — point at what others are eating. A 5-minute walk from Yang's Fried Dumplings.

properties.description: Upscale Yunnan cuisine restaurant in a beautifully restored heritage building near The Bund, known for aromatic minority-ethnic dishes and a curated cocktail list
properties.sustainability_notes: Yunnan cuisine uses diverse wild mushrooms and herbs; menu changes seasonally
properties.notes: Reservations strongly recommended for dinner. Try the cross-bridge noodles, grilled goat cheese, and Yunnan ham. Excellent cocktail program. Worth the splurge.

properties.description: Dense cluster of street food stalls and snack shops surrounding the City God Temple, serving Shanghai classics: smelly tofu, sesame cakes, tanghulu, and more
properties.address: City God Temple area, Fangbang Middle Rd, Huangpu District
properties.notes: Prices are tourist-inflated but the variety and atmosphere are worth it. Go hungry. Popular items: 酒酿圆子 (glutinous rice balls in sweet wine), 梨膏糖 (pear candy). Adjacent to Yu Garden.

properties.description: One of Shanghai's classic local food streets packed with unpretentious Shanghai-style restaurants serving smoked fish, braised pork, and homestyle Shanghainese cooking
properties.notes: Less touristy than Chenghuangmiao. Good for a proper sit-down meal of authentic Shanghainese cuisine. Lunch sets are good value.

properties.description: Lively pedestrian food street off West Nanjing Road with a mix of popular local chains, bubble tea shops, grilled skewers, and international fast-casual options
properties.notes: Convenient when exploring West Nanjing Road and Jing'an Temple area. Good for an affordable lunch or afternoon snack break.

properties.description: Established Shanghainese restaurant beloved by locals and expats alike for its refined Benbang cuisine — braised pork belly, drunken chicken, and wonton soup done right
properties.notes: Reservations recommended. Long-standing local favorite that doesn't pander to tourists. Good choice for a proper Shanghainese dinner. English menu available.

properties.description: China's most famous hot pot chain, celebrated for over-the-top hospitality — free manicures, snacks, and children's activities while you wait for your table
properties.address: Near Nanjing East Rd, Huangpu District
properties.notes: Expect waits of 1-2 hours on weekend evenings — add your name to the queue app (扫码取号) as soon as you know you want to go. The service spectacle is part of the experience.

properties.description: One of Asia's most avant-garde dining experiences: a single table for 10 guests, multi-sensory 20-course tasting menu with synchronized light, sound, and scent — consistently on World's 50 Best
properties.address: Secret location revealed upon reservation, Shanghai
properties.opening_hours: Dinner only, reservation required weeks in advance
properties.notes: Book via uvbypp.cc months in advance. Pickup by minivan from a meeting point. Extremely exclusive — only 10 seats per night. For serious food enthusiasts with a large budget.
